name: event_cancellation_thread

thread_emails.subject: You're Invited: Company Picnic - March 14th
thread_emails.body_text:
Dear Employees,

You're invited to our annual company picnic!

Date: Saturday, March 14, 2026
Time: 11:00 AM - 4:00 PM
Location: Sunny Park, Pavilion A
          123 Park Drive, Sunnyvale

Bring your families! Food and games provided.

RSVP by March 7th.

Company Events Team

thread_emails.subject: CANCELLED: Company Picnic - March 14th
thread_emails.body_text:
Dear Employees,

We regret to inform you that the company picnic scheduled for March 14th has been CANCELLED due to the forecasted severe weather.

We are looking at alternative dates and will send a new invitation soon.

We apologize for any inconvenience.

Company Events Team

notes: Tests that cancellation email marks event as cancelled rather than deleting
